meta.purpose: Define the core cognition of this domain.
meta.load_condition: Always load when this domain is selected.

axioms.full_statement: Explain the axiom in a testable and domain-specific way.

ontology.essence: What this concept really means in this domain.
ontology.trigger_signal: When should the agent notice this concept is relevant.

stances.stance: The domain's default position on an issue.
